name: Stuffed Thanksgiving Pumpkins
recipeIngredient: Soy sauce, low sodium to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Slice off the top 1/2 inch of each pumpkin and scoop out the seeds.
3. Bake pumpkins for 15 minutes.
4. In a large skillet over medium-high heat, heat stock or water to simmering until onions are softened but not browned. Add garlic, sage, thyme, and bread crumbs. Cook, stirring, 1 minute, then remove from heat and stir in remaining ingredients.
5. Lightly fill pumpkins with stuffing. (Any remaining stuffing may be baked separately in a lightly oiled baking dish.)
6. Bake for 15 minutes, or until stuffing is lightly browned and heated through. Be careful not to overbake the pumpkins, as they will split. Serves 8.
